violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Drawer under grill at 44-46F
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean shelving in walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in kitchen and walk in cooler need more thorough cleaning.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Chicken strips and rice were sitting out on prep line. Chicken at 90F, rice was at 125-140. Limit amount of working product sitting out during slower times.--Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Diced tomatoes on service cart were at 60F after 2 hrs. Either ice container or mark on container a discard time of 4 hrs.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Ground beef and whole muscle beef stored in same bay of 3 compartment sink.--Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw chicken/pork stored above ready to eat veggies in walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. Multiple wet wiping cloths on food contact counters.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop handles were stored in product in bean and rice bins.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean shelving in walk in cooler.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need for chlorine dishwasher in bar and for sink and surface sanitizer used for buckets and 3 compartment sink.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Prevented, separated, segregated (5 pts deducted)
Appropriate procedures (2 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Prevented, separated, segregated (5 pts deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
